reviews.title: Rude front office
reviews.text: Front office staff were rude.  Room slippers were torn. Accused of missing slippers without checking the room, it was found in the room.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Namrut,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback. I am truly sorry to hear that your recent stay at our resort did not meet your expectations.

Please accept my sincerest apologies for the issues you experienced.

As for the slippers and laundry bag, I have followed up with both Housekeeping and our reception team. I was informed that the slippers were indeed found inside the safety box and returned to the team during checkout. I regret that this was not handled more graciously on our end, and I apologize if the tone or manner in which the issue was addressed caused further frustration.

Thank you again for your feedback. I regret that your stay did not reflect the high standards we aim to deliver and hope that we will have a chance to better serve you in the future.

Warm regards,
Olga Gergenkop
General Manager

reviews.title: Poorly run hotel with bad breakfast & unfriendly staff at a great location
reviews.positives:
A positive feature of the site is a small coffee shop that serves Starbucks coffee, but not very good pastries or food unfortunately. It's also a bit warm and it closes at 4pm already. Nevertheless it sort of saved the day for me as I have to usually work a couple of hours a day. 

The location of the hotel on the other hand is perfect, with direct access to the beach. There are a number of pools which aren't big but big enough. The food at the restaurant is good enough with a great view.
reviews.negatives:
The suite is big and spacious, but arranged in a slightly strange way - presumably due to old-fashioned layout of the building. The bathroom is comparatively small, without a separate toilet. Windows and screen doors are quite outdated, and the overall design of the room is very plain and basic. The A/C worked well enough, but was quite loud, with hideous A/C units in front of the rooms. The hallway leading up to the room is dark and feels like a cheap apartment building. The TV worked but there was not a single movie channel to watch.

The gym in this place is an absolute disaster and quite frankly a safety hazard. The elliptical machines don't really work (and are probably 20 years old), and the weight machine in the center of the gym must be at least 30 years old. I've been to countless hotel gyms around the world - including ones with old equipment, but I have never seen anything like this. The weight plates are literally cracked - it's an absolute mystery to me how this does not get addressed by an international hotel chain.

The service isn't great but good enough, however I was extremely disappointed with the overall friendliness and quality of service at the resort. Almost every hotel I have been to in Thailand has extremely friendly and courteous staff, that will greet you even when you are just walking around the property. Not so at the Sofitel however, you never feel welcome or appreciated. You don't even get greeted when you walk through the lobby, which I found somewhat shocking.

The breakfast is mediocre at best, and again, one of the worst I have experienced in Thailand. Don't expect good bread, (edible) pastries or a wide fruit selection. On most days they didn't even have bananas, we were lucky enough to have Papaya on 2 of the 5 days. Thankfully they have a fairly decent coffee machine and an omelet station, but that's about it. Even the jam selection was pathetic.

reviews.title: Disappointing compared with other Novotels
reviews.text: As acknowledged by the hotel management, the Internet and television systems are both presently below expectations and below the standard of other Novotel hotels.  The hotel had several groups staying when I was there and the reception staff gave me an inappropriate room located furthest away from the beach (not visible at all from the balcony).  I could only see a decrepit water tower and overgrown garden of the neighbouring property.  There was no privacy on the balcony which had insect issues (a notice on the doors advised residents to keep the doors closed) and there was road noise from trucks and other vehicles using the road at the front of the hotel.

reviews.title: Disappointed with Novotel  Accor Group
reviews.text:
I grew up with the notion that Novotel was synonymous with good accommodation. So We were elated to have found a NOVOTEL RESORT in Rayong.

We were really dissapointed with their service a management style.

They gave us two room facing the parking lot on a beach resort? When we complained they upgrade us to two room facing a next door grabage dump.

Who drive three hours from Bangkok to Rayong to stay on a room like that?

Finally we had to pay extra for a upgraded room with a better view on another wing on the third floor but no lift.

I was sad to acknowledge to my family that the Novotel service standard has gone down the drain.
The Novotel I used to know will have not even make those ugly view room available for free, let alone charge for it.

This one of the worst experience I got booking online.

Will never visit any Novotel from now on.

reviews.title: Declining standards

Novotel try their best to make this hotel to their standard, but fail due to the hotels owner, a shame, I would not classify it as 3 star Novotel, more a two star. F & B terrible, was good two years ago but standards have slipped

reviews.title: Great view, great pool, perfect beachwalk
Awful one of the most dysfunctional hotels ever
reviews.text:
I hate giving bad reviews but this hotel deserves it. 
Hopefully the new HK GM & Thai VP can solve the many problems this place has? 

1. The first problem is location. it is better for the traveller to book directly in Koh Samet..nothing here worth staying for, even as a stop over as we found out. 

2.This hotels hires 4 cheap trainee staff from the Ph. 
What for is a big question? 
I can understand why 2 work in reception, but all the Thai staff speak English anyway. 

The empty restaurant bar by the pool has two further Filipina waitresses, who told me, how much they hated this job, because they hate Thai food-(to hot)& Thais, because when they serve Thais clients, they naturally speak English. 
The Thai clients are offended and ask them to speak Thai, they reply they are not Thai! 
The Thai clients reply they want a Thai waitress that speaks Thai...actually Thai or Filipino staff were 100% unhappy. 

There is many more to report in respect to scams. 
A hotel from Hell!..Still I wish the HK Gm and the VP good luck in sorting the many problems out!

reviews.title: Highway Robbery
reviews.text:
The hotel is located 20 or 30 km from Rayong city and rather than offer a reasonable mode of transportation they charge 1800 baht round trip.  That is about $60 US for a 60 minute taxi ride.  almost 1 week salary for Thailand.  Hence "Highway Robbery".  
One evening we decided we wanted an ice cream novelty.  Since no 7-eleven close the hotel was the place to buy.  They charged us 600 baht for 2 ice cream bars.  I thought it was ridiculous but it was a romantic night, we don't drink alcohol and it was hot outside and we decided to pay.  I was angry but we wanted them....you know we only live once.  The following day as we walked past the same freezer we noticed a sign that CLEARLY stated the price was 20 baht for the same treat.  I decided to mention this to the front desk as I thought maybe an employee was ripping us off.  The response was chilling.  The desk clerk laughed and said they indeed raise the price when there is no competition.
Needless to say I will never return to this hotel or ANY OTHER Novotel or any of their sister hotels.  They truly suck canal water.

reviews.title: Nice beach, quite but too hot. Very Bad Sevice
reviews.text:
We stayed there for 1 night. We have 1 year old girl and a 2 years old boy. We requsted a baby cot at the front and they said they will bring to the room. And we arrived around noon. Then we went to swim. Then me and my girl came back around 4PM. We still hadn't got the baby cot. So I called to the front and wait for about 30 mins. I would say at this part they are slow. The front said they have many cue so we have to wait. Ok then. 

But when the baby cot arrived, I put my little girl into the crib then i went to get change. She screamed and i ran and  found out that she fell into the hole!!!! The baby cot didn't have the wood board to support to mattress!!!!!... They just put the mattress on the top of the wood structure which have alot of nails stick out !!!! I cann't even think what would happen if she get the nail pierce to her. That's so bad service!!!! I called and told the front about the baby cot. They said they will send the people to come to check. So I waited about 30 mins again. For me, in the case like this and the big hotel like this, when the customer complained like this they should be faster as they can. Not just slow like this.

Then the housekeeper arrived and said, she will change to a new one. That's it. That's all they said. And they just said that is another housekeeper fault. For me, I don't want to ask for anything but i feel like they should do better than said that is another housekeepers' fault. And my girl didn't hurt just shock alittle bit so i let it go.  I am writing this to a family who will request a baby cot. You should check your baby cot first before you put your baby into it. Because your baby might not be lucky as mine. Especially, if your baby is still little. The baby's head can crack to the floor.

Because of too crowded guests, the buffet breakfast ran out super quick and too slow to refill. The hotel wall is too thin, so the noise along the hallway comes in. There is no elevator in the building, and people used the swimming pools walked back to the room soaking all the way so the stairs were dangerously slippery. Overall, unpleasant stayed.

After and hour we got some hot water but had the same probelm again in the morning. A cold shower is not how I like to start my day.
The food in the hotel was very expensive by Thai standards however there was a good inexpensive restaurant acroos the road. The staff were nice, the property beautiful but not a good value. I live in Thailand and there are many nicer places to stay in this price range. Look around before booking.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: I booked here because I thought the hotel name was similar to one I had stayed at in Bangkok, which was very good in every way. However, I was disappointed with this place in Rayong. It's a good thing I only booked one night because I thought I would try it first and then decide, and I was right. The room stated it could accommodate 3 people, but when I checked in, I had to pay for an extra bed at a cost of 1100 baht, and upon check-out it was 1150 baht. Disappointment 1: There was only one very flat pillow provided, and the mattress was not soft, causing irritation. The room was advertised as upgraded, but upon checking in, it was at the end of the hallway. When I entered, the bathroom door had cracks, the toilet was very small, and the room door also had cracks. There were no towels provided, so I had to request them. There were no dishes or utensils available, and if I wanted them, there would be an additional charge, which other hotels do not have. Disappointment 2: The Wi-Fi was not working, and I had to wait for a technician to come and fix it, having to call multiple times for them to check it. By the time I could use it, it was six o'clock, which was quite unreasonable. Disappointment 3: The cleanliness was just okay. The air conditioning was normal. The dining area was rather far, and if there were any promotions, they wouldn't deliver it to the room. When I went to buy something, there were no bags provided for customers to carry, so I had to carry things without a bag. Disappointment 4: The breakfast was diverse, which was good, but when I came in to relax before checking out, I was shocked by the very loud sounds of repairs going on, which was unbearable. Disappointment 5: If you plan to stay here, you need to prepare everything yourself and choose a better view because there is nothing wow about this place.
reviews.response:
เรียน ท่านลูกค้าที่เคารพ

ทางเรารู้สึกเสียใจอย่างยิ่งต่อความไม่สะดวกในหลายประเด็นที่ท่านได้แจ้ง ไม่ว่าจะเป็นเรื่องค่าเตียงเสริมที่เกิดความคลาดเคลื่อนของราคา ความสะดวกสบายของที่นอนและหมอน สภาพห้องพักและอุปกรณ์ภายในห้อง ความล่าช้าในการแก้ไขปัญหา Wi-Fi รวมถึงการประสานงานที่ไม่รวดเร็วเพียงพอ สิ่งเหล่านี้ไม่ใช่มาตรฐานการบริการที่เราตั้งใจมอบให้กับลูกค้าของเรา

แม้ท่านจะชื่นชมในเรื่องความหลากหลายของอาหารเช้า ทางเราก็ยังตระหนักดีว่าประสบการณ์โดยรวมของท่านยังไม่เป็นที่น่าพึงพอใจ ซึ่งเรารู้สึกเสียใจอย่างแท้จริง

reviews.title: Poor Management
reviews.text:
Seems management is taking no interest. My family and I have been staying here for 15 years and watching it diminish in quality and maintenance. Can only assume tgere is a plan to renovate. 

Saw a woman fall THRU the deck when it collapsed under her. Best they could offer was for the pool attendant to put ice in a service the. Then offered a free massage!  No management visited her and no offer of medical assistance.   Another example was ripped umbrellas not replaced and any with a small tear left for the wind to totally destroy. Plates etc left around the pool overnight - not nice to come down to in the morning. 

2hiyrs notice of a wedding taking up areas and expected noise. We guests just did not count. 

Food of such a poor standard as to see the guests visiting the "cafe" across the road. Staff have become slovenly., though sweet.   There has been no attempt to improve the fare. 

Think the heart has gone out of the establishment. Shame on Nibitel, it was a little gem

reviews.title: Quiet Location on the Beach but past its best
reviews.text:
Was hoping for big things as a bolt hole from where I live in Pattaya to come and relax with the family.
Booked a non smoking room and was told we could not have a non smoking room and only smoking was available, even when I pointed out that I was with my 6 month old daughter and we did not want a smoking room they were unable or unwilling to change nor was a non smoking upgrade offered...Bad start
Hotel itself is quite remote you will need a car to get about the plus side is that the beach itself is nice and quiet.
The room I booked was standard and was fine enough a bit frayed around the edges but suitable for the cheap price the staff bought a baby cot as requested immediately which was good.
Breakfast buffet was average at best and I'm comparing this only with the numerous Thai hotels I've stayed in over the years.
First night (wet season) there was a massive storm so all the electrics got knocked out including the air con.

My review was not intending to sound so negative at he beginning but thats the way I remember it.

reviews.title: Private Area
reviews.text: My friends & I were traveling on a group of eleven people and visited this resort in May 2012.  However, we had a very unpleasant experience with the shuttle bus driver of this hotel. We booked a shuttle bus service to Ban pier at 12:30pm on 13 May 2012.  However, the driver dropped us off at a different pier. We requested him to send us back to the Ban pier but were ignored. Then the driver was talking to another woman in Thai language which we couldn’t understand and then left. Our plan was to go to the Ban Pier to catch the free shuttle boat at 1:30pm to Samed Club Hotel. So we asked the woman whom the shuttle bus driver talked with to see if any free shuttle boat was available there. She replied if we wanted to go to Samed Club, we needed to pay for the boat.  At that moment, we were so confused and helpless. So we asked another person for assistances and discovered that we were in the prier named Munisit the Prarati Pier.  It sounds ridiculus that the hotel driver doesn’t know the location of Ban Pier. It was very clear that the hotel provides shuttle bus service go to Ban Pier only but why we were dropped us off at another pier. As a result, we missed the free shuttle boat. Eventually, we were forced to pay 3300THB for the boat service go to Samed Club from Munisit the Prarati Pier. As the frequent visitors of Thailand, we were so disappointed to be treated like this.

reviews.title: Don't stay here until December 2011
reviews.text:
We reserved three nights at the Novotel Rim Pae Resort Rayong. The main pool and the Italian restaurant are under reconstruction and jack hammers go from morning until night. A notice claims the work will be finished by October. My guess is it will be at least December. The pictures tell the story.

The poolside ground floor balcony to our room was dusty and the pot plants were dying from lack of water. An accumulation of cigarette butts in the pots reflected on poor room management.

A green snake, was between us and our room after breakfast.There were plenty of creepy crawlies for nature lovers.

The wind on the beach is relentless; better to vacation at Koh Samui at this time of the year. The choppy waves here are unpleasant, the beach sand is brown, and sewage is washed up onto the beach. You will be alone if you swim in the ocean.

The resort is 37 kms south of Rayong city and a long way from anywhere with no local attractions to visit. Saturday night dinner in the resort restaurant was marred by a university faculty singing karaoke in the adjoining room while people on cellphones from that room invaded the restaurant to talk at the top of their voices on subjects from car repairs to house moves. Outside, the Truscott family had a reunion with 20 children who screamed and yelled and played from 6:50am in the pool outside our room and banged doors until midnight.

The Thai restaurant across the road from the resort is recommended for breakfast, lunch and dinner at a quarter the price of the resort; it's quiet. The food's good; breakfast of freshly squeezed orange juice, coffee, two eggs any style, bacon and toast cost Baht 120 or $4. Thai and western food is available all day.

We left a day ahead of schedule - forfeiting the money paid in advance for the third night. Fortunately we had a hire car so we could escape! Such was our "quiet weekend away from Bangkok."
Room Tip: Go to Koh Samui instead.

reviews.title: Novotel Rim Pae Resort
reviews.text: The Novotel Rim Pae Resort is a quiet and out of the way resort approximately 30 km from Rayong. The resort must be 15-20 years old and really requires some renovation and innovative management. It would rate as 3.5 stars. Disappointingly, the restaurants were quite staid in their approach and despite the fact we were on the beach, there was no grilled seafood to be had.

reviews.title: Get some comfy beds
reviews.text: I've stayed at a few Novotels and generally like these properties. At Rayong, however, the beds are extremely uncomfortable. Rock-solid! We stayed 2 nights and the first we barely slept at all. Thankfully for the second night we used some extra duvets underneath to soften the feeling, but not by much. The Cha-Am Novotel had decent beds so why does the Rayong one have slabs of granite to sleep on? Aside from the beds, the hotel is nice, pool is nice, great beach. Note that they do have some fairly major construction on one of the swimming pools right now which is not mentioned while booking. They said they would start at 10am and finish by 5pm, but these hours were not adhered to, even on a sunday. generally, a disappointing stay this time and will be looking for alternate properties when we return to Rayong in 2 weeks.

The front beach is also great. Just the water in this area is not so clear. Don't know wy. But at least far from the noise and crowded of Pattaya !

Olga Gergenkop

reviews.room_type: Premier Room 2 Single  Beds, Garden View

reviews.title: Family 2 Room Pool View
reviews.text:
1) There was no welcome drink upon arrival. I found out later, when I reached the restaurant on the second night, from the staff that there was hibiscus juice.
2) The room was spacious, but the dust on the curtains and the noise from the balcony door was loud and stiff.
3) Chinese guests stayed and washed their feet in the swimming pool. The pool water had debris like leaves and branches, and some pools were cloudy, but the pool by the sea was clean and nice to use, with a good atmosphere.
4) We came to the beach but there wasn't a single seafood dish served. Breakfast included noodle soup with meatballs, which wasn't delicious. The congee was bland and consisted only of rice. The stir-fried noodles had wide noodles and Chinese kale, the ham was not good, the sausage was acceptable but average, the salad was quite good, the mashed potatoes were bland, and the spinach with cheese was not tasty. The fruit juices available were orange juice, guava juice, apple cider, but I preferred the butterfly pea drink and chrysanthemum tea more.
5) The hotel's restaurant had a limited food selection and expensive prices. There was a pizza deal of 2 for 1 (the salmon topping was not very fresh, like smoked salty salmon).
6) The accommodation was by the beach, with a small kids' club. The beach sand near the accommodation was a bit dirty, and you had to wear shoes to go out and put them down close to the sea. The sea had strong waves, but it was clean and fun to play in.
reviews.response:
Dear Khun Waraporn, 

Thank you for your feedback. We apologize for the inconveniences you experienced during your stay, including the welcome drink, room cleanliness, pool maintenance, breakfast quality, and beach area. Your comments are valuable to us, and we will address these issues to improve our services. We hope to welcome you back for a better experience.

Best regards,
Olga Gergenkop
General Manager

reviews.title: strange room layout & poor room service

The room we had did not have proper cupboard and drawers, not sure why, we had to "live off our suitcase", and the room was located near to the reception and ballroom.  A company outing had a party in the ballroom going until late at night and the music and very loud.  Staff not available to serve the room. reviews.title: Hotel okay but room dreadful
reviews.text: The hotel is located on a nice quiet beach with good facilities. Booked a king superior room. The room was past it's use by date. Been driving all day so went to bed around 9pm. Just getting to sleep when a bright flash went off in the room. Didn't know what was happening. Getting back to sleep again then a loud click followed by a bright flash again. Just like a camera. After the third time I got out of bed to watch. After some time it happened again. Appeared to come from around the light near the entry. Rang reception, a man came up, told him it could be the light but he went into the ceiling. Eventually he came down plus removed the light. Got back into bed but a short time later flash happened again. I went to reception and asked for another room. No king rooms available so had to move to a twin across the hall. Midnight by this stage - wrecked sleep. Believe it or not, the flashing started in the new room sometime during the next night. Wife insisted on leaving the lights on for the rest of the night. Another wrecked night's sleep. The least that management could have done is put us in a better room not a worse one and given us some type of refund. Will be following up with Accor.

reviews.text: If you are a city person, this resort is isolated with no way to flag a taxi. They have van service to the nearest towns only several times per day. With that said, it is the isolation, the love of sea and sand as well as the great view that keeps you here. It is "kid friendly" and a real family hotel. The staff members are very kind and accepting of small children even though it has no high chairs for babies 7mos - 18 mos.  Restaurant service by the pool is quite SLOW. You can easily wait over 30 minutes for a simple canned or bottled drink. If you question their lack of speed, they can get a drink to you in 15 minutes. They appear understaffed. The pool men are so helpful and kind. As far as the reception is concerned, they would rate a cheerful, friendly and helpful.

I would come back if I want an inexpensive, secluded beach trip. There is nothing to write home about outside of the resort. Luckily I am a resident here in Thailand so I was able to drive out and have some Thai food. The food in the hotel was very expensive so keep this in mind if you are coming down without transport. Add about 1000 baht (around 35 US dollars) for food per person.

The decor was not over done at all. 2 beautiful pools also. 

The hotel had a 2pm check in. I arrived at noon and had to wait 2 hours before I could get in. Beware of this. Not good.
reviews.positives: Nice beach to play on.  Good view looking into the gulf on Thailand.

reviews.title: Nice swimming pool area
reviews.text:
We have stayed in this hotel a couple of times and were always very happy. Nice rooms, quiet and relaxing location, great swimming pool, nice restaurants. 

However this time we were very disappointed with the service in the Italian restaurant. We ordered a bottle of wine and waited 40 minutes. Then we were told, that this wine is not in stock. So we ordered another one and waited another 25 minutes. Food came, but not plates. After another 15 minutes the plates came but meanwhile the food was cold. Very disappointing.

Also this time check in and check out very slowly and the aircon was not working properly as well.

But o.k, this was only one time, all the other stays before no problems.

Location is very good if you like it quiet and if you like a quite nice beach. Otherwise there is not much to do and you need transportation.

reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your thoughtful feedback with us. We are pleased to hear that you enjoyed the peaceful atmosphere of our hotel, as well as our clean pool and beach and the lovely surrounding scenery.

We also sincerely appreciate your comments regarding the room and shower facilities. Your suggestion about updating the room has been noted and shared with our management team for future improvement planning.

It is especially wonderful to know that our breakfast team made you feel welcome and were able to provide gluten-free bread to meet your needs. Your kind words will be shared with them and will certainly encourage our staff to continue delivering attentive and personalized service.

Thank you once again for your valuable feedback. We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back for another relaxing stay in the future.

Warm regards,
Supichaya Chumruedee
Front Office Manager

I understand your concerns regarding the room and vegan food options. While our property provides a simple beachfront experience, I appreciate your comments and will ensure our team receives more training on dietary requirements to better accommodate guests with specific preferences.

I hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again in the future. Safe travels!

Warm regards,
Olga Gergenkop
General Manager

I understand that our location may feel a bit far from certain conveniences, and we’re sorry for any inconvenience this caused. We aim to provide a peaceful retreat by the beach, and we appreciate your understanding regarding the need for taxis or Grab rides for exploring the area.

reviews.title: Good room with the private beach.

reviews.title: Great Hotel, good for family.
reviews.text: The hotel is great for Family travel with young children.  Kids love swimming pools, with small slider, and private beach.  The hotel is also located not far from local market and the pier to Samed Island.

reviews.title: Nice and comfortable
reviews.text: I stayed in Novotel Rayong for 3 nights and overall was happy with my stay. The room was clean and comfortable and the facilities (pool etc) very nice. The beach in front of the hotel is very clean. Breakfast was not included in my roomrate and I was a bit disappointed that there were no options other than the main breakfast buffet, which I thought at 400 thb was overpriced (there are some local restaurant around though). The airconditioning in the room was also very loud and noise from other rooms (showers mainly) and the corridor was a bit disturbing.

reviews.title: Great location with excellent swimming pool
reviews.text: good swimming pool and beach. good for relaxing and swimming. there is no breakfast include in agoda price.

reviews.title: Beachfront hotel but nothing speacial
reviews.text:
Stayed there for a night. Did not expect too much, and that's probably a good thing. Got a room in the old building wing (tower 2 I think) on third floor. Room was ok, garden/pool view, clean bathroom, ok bed, and the air con worked just fine. Let down by 19th century TV with nothing worth watching on. Had to settle to watch a game of football at the beach bar, which was nice nonetheless with chill sea breeze. Overall, one of the better hotels around at this price I think we're ok with it.

Downside: There was a group function in the garden in front of the beach banging on loud speaker and ridiculous karaoke sining. For those who were seeking for a quiet time to recharge their energy on a beachfront stay, this was a turn off.

reviews.title: Good swimming pools for children
reviews.text: The hotel has 3 swimming pools. It was good for children. There are 2 restaurants, Thai and Italian. Food (dinner) was ok but not that great comparing to the price and waiting time. Breakfast was also not that good but acceptable. Beach was nice but there were too many speed boats at the beach. The speed boats ruined the ocean view. The hotel does not provide a bottle opener so you need to bring from home.

reviews.title: Lovely Hotel near to beac nice views of beach
reviews.text: Relaxing, close to beach, nice pools, and very peaceful

reviews.title: OK hotel with private beach area
reviews.text: Room is okay but there are water flow trouble with toilet & shower room. Renovation may be neccessary. Private beach is nice. However, there are not enough amount of chairs for guess. Available chairs were occupied from morning time by guesses.

reviews.title: Nice looking pool area
reviews.text: even though i booked ahead and asked for certain things in the extras ,i did not get them and when i enquired at reception on arriaval i was met by blank faces from non english speaking staff.i would have thought that novotel hotels being world wide would at least have english speaking staff.the room was ok,not what i asked for, but adequate.

reviews.title: Lovely family hotel
reviews.text:
My family and me were here already many times in the past and always my kids (no already grown up) loved to stay in this hotel. Unfortunately the big pool was under renovation (not told by Agoda) so we have to stay in the smaller pool, but no problem.
Beach was as beautiful as before and also clean. (no jellyfish).
I think for future the hotel needs to renovate not only the pool but as well the rooms which are a little bit old fashion. Prices for food and drinks are usual expensive and should a little bit lower according the low season promotions.
reviews.positives: nice garden - pool for the kids - pool for adults- very nice beach

reviews.title: a litttle out of the way
reviews.text: The hotel itself is pretty and the staff friendly at all times. The location is nice for the beach as you can walk straight on to it past the bar, however, it's dirty with bottles and plastic bags. The room is big enough although the bathroom a little 'pokey'. A large swimming pool presents itself as a nice to spend a sunny afternoon, especially if you have children.

reviews.title: good location
reviews.text:
This is not the first time at this hotel for our family but every time oc our return the hotel reamins same Novotel very good maintenance I must say even years passed. We love the location where we can enjoy the private beach as well as going
shopping at Ban Pae or to Samaed Island.

reviews.title: nice place & great location
reviews.text:
Generally Novotel Rayong is good, room rate is reasonable but only "Breakfast" that looks a quite high charge due to there are a few options to have them.

Room is clean and fully amenities.
reviews.positives: Great location with the private beach

reviews.title: good infrastructure tired but clean
reviews.text: while rooms are about 3 star at best the public areas are fine
reviews.positives: staff good not much english spoken but not a real issue

reviews.title: Resort with all inclusive feeling
reviews.text: novotel is a very nice resort where all is provided. the pools are nice for the cjildren. it is friendly for families with children. the prices level are higher then in the neiboring areas like ban phe and mae phim. if you want a all inclusive feeling and do not mind paying a preimium this can be a place for you. the resort is situated a fair distance from nearest town. a long the beach you have a few restauratns serving food and a few nebouring resorts.
reviews.positives: Nice pool area and friendly staff

reviews.title: very cozy and private.  Worth for money.
reviews.text: There are not too many hotels in Rayong that are worth for money to spend.  I give the credit to Novotel for making green and lovely environmental hotel that makes me fel like livig at home as it offers me privacy and good facility.  Spa also is very good to try after enjoy time at the beach.  My very first review of this hotel comes after I finished my third visit.  Have fun an enjoy it,
reviews.positives: I love the environment and food.  Beach is very neat and very relax.
reviews.negatives: I expect more hotel activities and less of Thai group that make loud noise

reviews.title: great hotel but isolated location
reviews.text:
Very good hotel environment. Can direct reach the beach after go through the swimming pool and garden. I like the low densty design of this hotel. The ratio of common facility area is high compare to the guest room.
The location is quite far from town. If you would like to have dinner outside the hotel, there is quite far and not much choice if you not go to Rayong city. Very good for short vacation.
reviews.positives: great swimming pool and great gerden. beach hotel
reviews.negatives: quite far from town

packing not enough at front of hotel must across street
activity cost is fair

reviews.title: Quiet trip
reviews.text: The hotel is quiet and it is on the beach. Very nice and friendly staff. I like the food there. But if you look for a more exciting life...this one might not suit you. It's located a bit far from market, shop, have to have your own transportation.
reviews.negatives: A little far away from other attractions

reviews.title: Quiet and relaxing
reviews.text: The Novotel is used a lot for conferences, so can be busy at times (when the conferences take a break) but the pool was quiet most of the time. The food was good (with the exception of breakfast which was ordinary and overpriced), but quite expensive. The beach is clean and has some pleasant local restaurants - nothing flash but good food.
reviews.positives: Well appointed rooms, nice pools, right next to huge beach
reviews.negatives: Breakfast poor value

reviews.title: Good hotel in Rayong
reviews.text: If you want to stay in Rayong, this hotel is the good choice. With their reasonable price and standard in service. There is private beach but pool is too small. It is better for family but not good for couple. Parking area should have roof or indoor. Location is good for relaxing. It's better if price is including breakfast.
reviews.positives: Private beach and professional in hotel business.
reviews.negatives: Far from shopping and restaurant.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Accommodation by the sea with 3 swimming pools. The staff is friendly and helpful, greeting guests with a smile. The housekeepers are lovely, the porters are charming, and the security guards are kind. The breakfast variety is good, but the keycard door to the room is hard to open and often doesn’t work well.

The biggest drawback is the terrible wifi; the TV has intermittent signal issues. Considering we were three people sharing one room for over 5,000 baht, it's not worth the price we paid. The room is not very new; it’s a renovated one.

Dear Mr.Martin,

many thanks for taking the time to share your thoguhts on your recent stay with us to the Agoda community.

I am thrilled to read you believe thhe property ia a lovely placw to stay and enjoyed our two large pools which continue to impress our guests.

For the benefit of the Agoda community please allow me to advise due to the Rayong provenice restrictions we are unable to servie alcholic beverages in the restaurant and public spaces, however can deliver to the comfort of your room. reviews.title: Good but overpriced, unfriendly front desk staff
reviews.text: This older hotel has excellent swimming pools with a nice beach. The breakfast was also good and dinner with live music was enjoyable.  It's a great option for 1-2 days with children or to just read a book by the pool and relax. Transport is a major issue. The hotel offers a very limited free shuttle into town. The lack of low-cost and free transport means the hotel offers "packages" that include transport and these are extremely overpriced. They are not helpful with taxis or any other requests. Taxis in town are also in on the "tourist trap" and charge a lot of money. I was able to get a Grab driver once for a better deal. Hotel prices are expensive and inexpensive rooms do not offer a beach or pool view. They are dark and the TV reception was bad. Internet is not good enough to use Netflix. For the area, I recommend staying on Ko Samet instead. People are friendlier and prices are better.
reviews.response:
Dear Hollie

Thank you for you kind feedback from your most recent stay with us. We are so happy that you were able to join us here in stunning Rayong. We are pleased to read that you found our property beautiful and our pools to be excellent.
Providing guest with a memorable holiday is our goal here at the Novotel Rim Pae, as your stay with us is important. Our property is situated on the beach and one that we hope our guest get to have the opportunity to enjoy the beauty of Amazing Thailand. If a guest would like to explore outside and into near by town we are easily situated between Baan Pae Twon and Mae Pim. . I am very sorry to hear that you felt our team was unfriendly at the front desk,I assure you that our entire team is here to serve our wonderful guests,! Service is the heart of our property and our team will most certainly follow up to resolve this matter and thank you so much for sharing you, and we hope to see you again.
Best wishes, The Novotel Team & Management

reviews.title: Pleasant hotel but some drawbacks
reviews.text:
Our Superior Room (213) was definitely on the small size, far too minimalist in décor for us, plus dark furniture The beds were a little on the hard side but not too hard but the pillows were nice and large. There were 2 OK 'easy chairs' and 1 upright chair by the table plus a good sized hanging space and enough drawers. A good sized in-room safe, tea/coffee facilities plus a mini-fridge made up the facilities in the room. TV was an old fashioned CRT but a good size and a good picture. Not many channels though. Air-con was powerful and did a good job, albeit sometimes got somewhat noisy. There was a small balcony with 2 plastic chairs but poor view. Bathroom was pretty tiny albeit with a large and deep sink, good for washing clothes. The shower was the in-bath type but water pressure was surprisingly good. However, temperature control was not so good and frequently  shifted between hot and cold. We had one power cut and it was not nice on a boiling hot afternoon to have the air-con etc die on one. Power came back after about 15 minutes but not a good state of affairs for a 4 star hotel. Also the hot water was non-existent on both the last night we were there and on the morning of our departure.
Breakfast was dreadful, especially at 412 baht each, poor in quality and high in price. The 2 other restaurants have 2 menus, one Italian, one Thai and International, and you can have both menus at either restaurant. Not a wide choice but OK and quality much better than breakfast for the Thai dishes, not the European. Service throughout was excellent, for us one of the strengths of the hotel. We never came across anything except utmost courtesy, politeness and helpfulness from every member of staff that we met, for us, an unequivocal 5 stars for service. Internet access was a definite disappointment with very limited availability. The hotel had 3 decent small to medium sized swimming pools. The beach in front of the hotel was good and well maintained.

I’d like to have more entertainment things for kids older than 4 y.o. PS4 is nice but there are just 3 games for elder teens (12+). So, kids btw 4 and 12 almost nothing to do. It’s said there are craft master class but we didn’t see any…
Another thing is garbage in the sea one day. It appears here and there always but one day it was very bad:( would be great if staff can clean the shore near hotel area or sea near the shore in the morning.

reviews.title: Nice place on the beach
reviews.text: The hotel room was neat and clean. The bed was good. The room was equipped with necessary things for tourist such as a bathrobe, hair dryer, tea&coffee facility, slippers, toiletries. The swimming pool adjacent to the beach was the thing we enjoyed most. The atmosphere was good and quiet. The hotel staff was friendly. But the spa wasn't open on time, perhaps it was a midweek day plus it was raining on that morning. We was informed from the reception that the spa has opened but once arrived at the spa, it was closed. We were lucky to meet a gardener who phoned the spa staff for us. Within 10 minutes, the spa was open. If you want to eat out, you have to drive more than 5 kilos to beach restaurant area.

reviews.title: Comfortable hotel with direct beach access
reviews.text: The hotel offers all international standard services (e.g. internet access, Spa service, valet parking) on the stretch of Klaeng beach, which is being developed with up-scale Condos and hotels. The beach by this hotel is however still much cleaner and in-tact with golden sand, when compared with those in Hua Hin. Our room was rather small with a window facing the hotel structure, but we did not mind as we stay the most of time outside by the pool or on the beach. The hotel has two restaurants – one Italian and one Thai-International – both are quite good. The only down side was that checking out took a bit longer than usual for the reception to arrange.

If you want action this is not your place, if you are after peace and quiet retreat this is for you. Pool and lobby were great and stylish but the rooms were outdated with old style television. Immaculate clean and fresh though. Hopefully they start to renovate rooms to match their pool and lobby. No free internet, that's a big minus in year 2012. 20min free time each day.

reviews.text: you get that great novotel standard which you can expect from accor hotel group. we return every year while in thailand just to charge our batteries. hotel is quite isolated but they provide mini bus to ban pae, a small fishing village and a pier where you catch ferry to koh sumet. the hotel has all the amenaties you need all set in a lovely tropical garden. the beach is one of the best i have experienced in rayong/chonburi district. see you next year

reviews.title: Private

The hotel has good location. Nice and quite  atmosphere.
The hotel has clean room and friendly staff who always welcome to give suggestions or helps.
Nice private beach with very nice view.
Big hotel sign which can help to see the location of the hotel clearly.
Very nice to revisit with couple or family.

reviews.title: Clean Hotel
reviews.text: I have been there with my family for 2 night before weekend then with my friends for 2 nights on weekend. I would recommend you not go to this place in the weekend, not only it's over-priced and crowded but it's conference roomm has no sound-proof. Around 10 pm. the conference is finished but it began the party for big group. That is when I don't apprechiate so much. Also in the morning when all those crowd woke up and joined you at breakfast.

reviews.title: bigger swimming pool closed for renovation
reviews.text:
When we arrived the reception informed us the big swimming pool is closed for maintenance until October 2011.
Anyway the hotel still has a reasonable sized second pool.
The beach is nice sand and clean, the water in the sea is safe even though it has some larger waves for Thailand.
Dinner in the restaurant we were disappointed as the service was slow and not what we expected, this was probably due to a big group function at the same time elsewhere in the hotel.
There is a nearby beach cafe "Pol's" which is cheap and cheerful good for a snack of BBQ seafood or chicken, and good for breakfast. You need to be laidback and ask what they have rather than rely on the menu if you want an early breakfast (before 11am). Hotel has a good buffet breakfast. We had 2 rooms with connecting door. One room was a bit smelly like musty so maybe it has not been occupied or the a/c may need servicing. When we complained they just sprayed with air freshener. The bathrooms were modern and nicely fitted, but the shower was very weak in water flow and only tepid water.
reviews.positives: lovely beach, good rooms, swimming pool, friendly staff

reviews.title: Good hotel

reviews.text:
Paying a return visit to this hotel as we enjoyed previous breaks here. On this occasion we found some facilities closed due to renovations and/or Covid 19 lock-down.
The hotel has attractive and well laid out gardens surrounding 3 swimming pools and direct access to the beach. 
The hotel is sited on a quiet stretch of the coast and personal transport is recommended for visiting local attractions in Rayong district.

reviews.title: Relaxing break by the sea
reviews.text:
A nice hotel with direct access to the beach. Well laid out gardens carefully maintained by staff.
There are several pools in the grounds for guests to choose from and pool staff keep them clean. Breakfast menu gives a reasonable choice of food. The poolside restaurant has a wide variety of international food as well as Thai. There is a nice beach stretching for several kilometers with safe swimming. Unfortunately not cleaned regularly to the standard tourists would like. The rooms are clean and comfortable with a balcony to relax on. Pool view rooms have a much better aspect over pools and gardens. Staff are efficient and helpful. The lack of a guest lift can be a problem for handicapped people. Your own transport is advisable as the hotel is some distance from shops and other attractions.

reviews.title: Lovely spot
reviews.text: The Novotel is on a beautiful beach with views across to Koh Samet. Our initial room was a bit dingy and overlooked the car park which was not a good start. I asked to move and the only available room was at a 500 Baht per night premium which we took. It was much nicer; brighter, views of the pool and more modern. The breakfast was good and the pools, spa and gym are great. nice for a long weekend spot.

reviews.title: Novotel Rayong
reviews.text:
Novotel was a nice stay for us during a long holiday weekend.  We got off to a bad start when the reception demanded 2000 baht or a credit card to secure the minibar.  We never use the minibar and felt as if they were implying that we would leave without paying our bill. This was very insulting and a really bad way to begin our stay, especially at a 4 star resort.

The bed was a torture and the pillow was as thin as a sheet of paper.  There was only one extra pillow. There was also only one umbrella provided during rainy season.  There was no water pressure in the shower and little hot water.  I would qualify it as barely warm. Our room did not respond to the key card after one day and we had to go to reception to get it sorted.  Parking was difficult to find and the guards were barely helpful in this regard.

Things got better from there, however. The resort is nice with a lovely beach.  The pools provided plenty of room for the many guests.  The restaurant was ok, but pricey for what you get.  Breakfast was fine.  Overall, this was a nice stay, mostly due to the beautiful beach and the close proximity to many beachfront dining options that offer far better food at much better value.

reviews.title: Nice resort, next to a nice beach
reviews.text:
I enjoyed the stay at Novotel. The nice Resort with 2 nice swimming pools is located next to the beach. The beach is beautiful. Very clean and just pure sand (beach and in the water).
The room was good with a balcony but a bit far from the beach. I guess the more expensive rooms are nearer to the beach/pools.
The breakfast was not inclueded. I was a bit disappointed about the breakfast. It was written the breakfast costs 350 B. But the service fee and tax was not included. So in fact it was 410 B. Too much for the breakfast which was ok, but not much more.
For a good resort the attendance of the staff was not good enough. On the beach nobody cared about the hotel guests and many chairs were busy with people who were not guests of the resort. There were too less chairs availible on the beach.
Also the staff on the reception could be more helpful.
Outside of the hotel is nothing. Ban Phe (pier to Koh Samed) is about 20 minutes away, and to Rayong city it's quite far. There are some local public taxi's (song taeu) to go to Ban Phe. 
Over all I enjoyed my stay there anyway. The beautiful, clean beach and the clean water made my stay very nice.
reviews.positives: Near to nice beach, nice rooms, good (italian) restaurant

reviews.title: Nice hotel on the beach of Rayong
reviews.text: Quite far from the harbour to Koh Samed.If you wanna spent time on the land beach , it's nice hotel. Nice swimming pool And Italian restaurant., we like it !!
reviews.positives: Nice hotel on the beach of Rayong.Nice swimming pool.There're nice Thai restaurant and Italian restaurant.
reviews.negatives: Quite far from the harbour to Koh Samed.

reviews.title: Novotel Rayong Hotel
reviews.text: If u want a reasonable hotel and not far from Bangkong,this hotel should be your choice. It has two swimming pools and pool size is O.K. The seafood restaurants are not far from here. In the morning, you can go to coffee shop in front of the hotel, it's good taste and reasonable prize.
reviews.positives: The prize is reasonable and beach is O.K. The seafoot restaurants are close to the hotel. The room service is O.K.
reviews.negatives: The room size is too small and it has a lot of mosquito.

reviews.title: Rayong Resort - Nice room and friendly staff
reviews.text: The room is good. The room size is ok, not big but not small. The swimming pool is Ok. There is a very small Jacuzzi pool in front of the Spa. I really like the Jacuzzi, I spent 15 mins. in there, very relaxing. The hotel is not near the market and there are no seafood restaurants near the hotel. The good seafood restuarant is 13 kilos. away from the hotel.
reviews.positives: The hotel is on the beach and the beach is very private and quite.
reviews.negatives: From the bacony of my room, the view was awful. I couldn't see the beach or even the garden.

reviews.title: Close to the sea, but the room is old.
reviews.text: Beachfront hotel, suitable for those who want to swim in the sea. Breakfast is acceptable, not very varied. The rooms are old, the air conditioning is cold and cannot be adjusted; it reverts back to the original setting. Overall it's okay, not wow. The only good thing is that it's by the sea and close to popular cafes.
reviews.response:
เรียน คุณลูกค้าที่เคารพ,

ขอขอบพระคุณเป็นอย่างยิ่งสำหรับการแบ่งปันความคิดเห็นเกี่ยวกับการเข้าพักของท่านค่ะ

เรายินดีที่ได้ทราบว่าท่านชื่นชอบทำเลที่ตั้งของโรงแรมซึ่งติดทะเล เหมาะสำหรับการเล่นน้ำ รวมถึงความสะดวกในการเดินทางไปยังคาเฟ่และสถานที่ท่องเที่ยวใกล้เคียง ซึ่งเป็นหนึ่งในจุดเด่นของพื้นที่นี้

ในส่วนของอาหารเช้า ทางโรงแรมขอขอบพระคุณสำหรับความคิดเห็น และจะนำไปพิจารณาเพื่อพัฒนาความหลากหลายของเมนูให้ดียิ่งขึ้น

ขณะเดียวกัน ทางโรงแรมต้องขออภัยสำหรับประสบการณ์ที่ไม่เป็นไปตามความคาดหวังในเรื่องสภาพห้องพักและระบบปรับอากาศที่ไม่สามารถปรับได้อย่างเหมาะสม ซึ่งส่งผลต่อความสะดวกสบายของท่าน เราได้ส่งต่อข้อมูลนี้ให้ทีมช่างและฝ่ายที่เกี่ยวข้องตรวจสอบและดำเนินการแก้ไขอย่างเร่งด่วนแล้ว

ขอขอบพระคุณอีกครั้งสำหรับความคิดเห็นอันมีค่า แม้จะมีบางจุดที่ยังไม่สมบูรณ์ แต่เรารู้สึกยินดีที่ท่านยังเห็นถึงข้อดีของทำเลและโดยรวมยังถือว่าการเข้าพักอยู่ในระดับที่พอใช้ได้

หวังเป็นอย่างยิ่งว่าจะมีโอกาสต้อนรับท่านกลับมาอีกครั้งในอนาคต เพื่อมอบประสบการณ์ที่ดียิ่งขึ้นค่ะ

reviews.title: A very nice resort located on the beach.
reviews.text: This is the first Novotel in Thailand, and although it was built a long time ago, the facilities are clean with traces of time. It connects directly to the sea from the hotel, and the sunset is magnificent. This place is very inconvenient if you don't have transportation. I was able to come here because I rented a bike in Pattaya. The fitness club does not live up to the Novotel name.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback with us. We are pleased to hear that you appreciated our beachfront location and enjoyed the beautiful sunset views, as well as the cleanliness of the hotel.

We also value your honest observations regarding the age of the facilities. As an established property, we continuously work on maintaining and improving our standards to ensure a comfortable stay for all our guests.

At the same time, we appreciate your comments regarding transportation convenience and the health club. Your feedback is very important to us, and we will share it with the relevant teams for review and improvement as part of our ongoing efforts to enhance the overall guest experience and facilities.

Thank you once again for your constructive feedback and for staying with us. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back again in the future for an even more enjoyable stay.

Warm regards,
Khun Supichaya Chumruedee
Front

reviews.title: Great place to just relax
reviews.text:
Stayed at Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort and it’s the kind of place you go to when you just want to slow down.

The beach is the real winner here—quiet, clean, and not crowded, perfect for morning walks or just doing nothing by the sea. The resort has a laid-back vibe with lots of greenery and big pools that make it easy to spend the whole day just relaxing.

Rooms are comfortable and spacious, though you can tell some areas could use a bit of updating. Still, everything feels well-kept and the staff are warm and helpful, which makes a big difference.

It’s a little far from town, so it’s more of a “stay in and unwind” kind of trip rather than one for exploring. Food is decent, but you might want to try nearby local spots for more variety.

Overall, it’s a great pick if you’re after a peaceful beachfront break without the crowds—simple, relaxing, and easy.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share such a detailed and thoughtful review of your stay with us. We are truly delighted to hear that Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort provided the peaceful and relaxing atmosphere you were looking for. It is wonderful to know that our quiet and uncrowded beach, lush greenery, and spacious pools helped create the slow-paced, restful escape you had in mind.

We also appreciate your kind words about the comfort of our rooms and the helpfulness of our staff. Your recognition means a great deal to our team, and it motivates us to continue delivering sincere and attentive service to every guest.

At the same time, thank you for your feedback regarding areas that could benefit from updates. We value these comments greatly, as they help us plan improvements that enhance both comfort and overall guest experience.

reviews.title: It's OK but NOT the Novotel as We Know It !!!
reviews.text:
Room # 426 ~ 2 x Nights ~ Booked via Agoda

Not the best stay to be honest.....

Staff are FANTASTIC and Welcoming....

Location is FANTASTIC

Rooms are Tired and Old.

When the Lift UP button in the Lobby does not work correctly when pressed and has NOT BEEN REPAIRED you know things are not great!!

Noisy corridors with Kidz allowed by their parents to SCREAM at 10:30pm!!!

We would stay here again however it is over priced for what you get.....
reviews.response:
Dear Jonathan, 

Thank you for staying with us at Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort. 

I am glad that you enjoyed the our Heartists' service. Indeed, the hotel is 35 years old, but we do regular touch-ups of the rooms and public areas. 

Thank you for bringing up the issue of the elevator button. Certain things, unfortunately, cannot be repaired by the hotel engineering team, as only certified engineers from elevator company are allowed to intervene. We are expecting the service engineer to come and fix it soonest. 

Novotel is a family-oriented brand, and we do attract families with kids of all ages, and sometimes their stay enjoyment spills out to public areas. We will be making an extra effort to inform parents on this.

I am truly sorry that these issues ruined your holiday. 

Thank you again for your feedback. 

Best regards, 
Olga Gergenkop
General Manager

reviews.text:
I have stayed at this hotel many times and been satisfied.  This time was a bit disappointing, though.  They omitted the usual welcome fruit basket.  The renovated Garden Wing room was spartan: no proper chair (with back), no drawers for clothing, VERY small bathroom (no tub, no electrical outlet).  The internet was slow and unreliable.  It was not possible to stream video.  Due to ongoing renovation the electrical power was out from about 11:00 am until 4:00 pm each day.  Ice must be ordered from room service, at 35 baht per bucket.  Reception staff do not seem very knowledgeable about the local area.  For example, I asked if there was a mini golf course nearby.  No one knew what mini golf is.  They referred me to a proper golf course!

Still, the restaurants are quite good, pool bar happy hour very pleasant, and the beach front location is excellent.  Also, there is a nice, informal, inexpensive, Thai restaurant just across the 3145 highway.  I will probably visit again.

reviews.title: Lovely smaller resort with good facilities
reviews.text: Room upgrade on arrival was a lovely surprise but the walls are paper thin and first night someone was in inter-connecting room next door and I could hear everything, thankfully they left the next day.  Novotel - please only use these rooms for families.  There was no guest lift in my block and staff took me via staff lift which was not very nice and doesn’t give a good impression.  Charged for slippers which I thought were complimentary.  I didn’t eat at the hotel so can’t comment on quality and value for money.   Location suited my needs to visit friends nearby.
reviews.room_type: Superior Room 2 Single Beds, Garden View

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: I have stayed at this hotel several times over the years.  The pool and beach are quite nice.  The Italian restaurant is very good, also.  I will caution you, though, that if you book through Agoda or a similar agency you will not earn Le Club Accor loyalty program credit, not even for your incidental expenses paid directly to the hotel.  This is why I rated the hotel only three stars on value for money.
reviews.response:

It is truly wonderful to welcome back a returning friend and gest of the property and to hear you enjoys everything we have to offer. 

Yes as mentioned Le Club points are only available by booking direct as policy. if you would like to have more information regarding your membership, please feel free to contact our team directly and we will be so happy to help you directly..

The Novotel Team & management

reviews.title: Good hotel, nice staff
reviews.text:
Staffs are very nice. Especially, Front office staffs always smile, willing to answer all the question with courtesy, even at the busy time as we went for the cycling race. 
Hotel facilities are good but the water in swimming pool is a bit too cold.

reviews.title: Good location with Private Beach
reviews.text:
We had a good stay overall. The resort has 2 swimming pools and have private beach. Well maintained facilities with children play area.
Break fast also good.
However, the room is bit old and need to be renovated.

reviews.title: Trop isolé
reviews.positives:
Personnel accueillant, piscines, bain à remous propres, chambre confortable et propre.
Petit déjeuner correct, on pourrait s'attendre à une meilleure qualité pour Novotel
reviews.negatives:
Établissement éloigné de tout, isolé, impossible de se rendre au centre-ville, les taxis sont inexistants et l'hôtel n'autorise qu'un seul aller par jour  avec leur navette ! On se sent un peu coincé à l'hôtel. 
Massage à 60 €, 10 € en moyenne dans le reste de la Thaïlande. 
Une tasse à café cassée m'a été facturée au moment de mon check-out... cela peut sembler normal mais faire payer 1,50 € une tasse quand on loge dans ce type d'établissement, c'est surprenant. 
Personne à l'accueil du petit déjeuner crée des problèmes prétendant qu'un tel est déjà venu avec une tierce personne (imaginaire...) jusqu'à reconnaître finalement son erreur. 
Plage pas très belle.

reviews.title: Perfect place to rest for a couple of days
reviews.text:
The map is unclear and yes the hotel is along the beach, the villas are across the street. The breakfast is excellent: good variety for both Europeans and Asians, good quality, although the room is noisy like a cantine.  We had a standard room facing the jungle, which was correctly renovated, however it was smelly and stuffy. I believe it was due to the lack of air. A sticker recommended to keep the sliding door to the balcony closed due to 
mosquitoes. A mosquito screen and a simple fan in the room would help! Some good "thai style" fragrance too. The swimming pools were fantastic and excellent massage by the beach at reasonable price. Nothing around the hotel, a few bars and a simple restaurant with great food and great price prepared and served by great people. Overall this was an excellent destination to rest for the week-end.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: La plage, les piscines,  le petit déjeuner,  magnifique jardin
reviews.negatives: L'accueil,  les odeurs de fumée pendant 2 jours, irrespirable.  Je suis consciente que c'est pas la faute de l'hôtel.

reviews.title: Lovely break away from Bangkok for the family
reviews.text: Great breakfast. Lovely staff. Our air-conditioning was leaking on the first night. This was not dealt with very well as the staff were not around to fix it. At 2am it took 1 hour for someone to come and see to the problem and then told us to move but would not help us with our things. The next day, however we were upgraded for the inconvenience. The pool was fantastic and access to the beach is excellent.
